do_not_paste_into_openclaw_json: OpenClaw 2026.5.x does not accept a top-level mcpServers key in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. Use `openclaw mcp set <name> '<json object>'` instead.

tushare.description: Tushare connector. Store TUSHARE_TOKEN outside git and return source, as_of, retrieved_at, fields, and limitations.

ifind.description: iFinD finance data connector. Configure user credentials outside git.

wind-local.description: Local Wind bridge or exported Wind data reader. Do not store terminal credentials in this repository.

bond-database.description: Local bond database for curves, spreads, issuers, ratings, holdings, NAV, and transactions.
